SEARCH
Package basicFiles.fileFactories

Class TabularFileFactory

java.lang.Object
basicFiles.fileFactories.TabularFileFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
FileFactory
public class TabularFileFactory extends Object implements FileFactory
Factory class specialized in the creation and management of TabularFile instances. This class implements the Singleton pattern to provide a global access point and leverages a central registry to ensure that instances are shared for any unique file path.
Author:
Elias Kassas

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BaseFile
    create(String path)
    Creates or retrieves a TabularFile instance associated with the specified path.
    static TabularFileFactory
    getInstance()
    Returns the unique instance of the factory.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static TabularFileFactory getInstance()
      Returns the unique instance of the factory. This method is synchronized to ensure thread-safe initialization in multi-threaded environments.
      Returns:
      The singleton instance of TabularFileFactory.

    • create

      public BaseFile create(String path)
      Creates or retrieves a TabularFile instance associated with the specified path. The method delegates instance management to the FileRegistry to maintain a single object per physical file.
      Specified by:
      create in interface FileFactory
      Parameters:
      path - The system path of the tabular file.
      Returns:
      A BaseFile (specifically a TabularFile object) corresponding to the given path.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If an IOException occurs during the tabular file initialization.
